title: 申请加入请在这里评论 （也可以直接发 Pull Request）
summary:
### 入选标准
* 网站 / App
* 如果是 Github 库， README 或顶部描述里，要附上网站或 App Store 地址，不能是纯粹针对开发者的工具，如果包含了针对开发者的工具，那就太多了。所以只允许针对普通用户的网站/App 列在表里

### 不收录的东西
* 开发者工具（Github 本质上就是个开发者工具大集合，收录开发者工具这个表会爆炸的）
* 社区类网站（v2ex，ruby-china，各种 php 社区，太多太多太多了。没法收。希望理解）

### 流程
看了评论后会做决定，
如果入了，会加进去。
如果没入，会告知你理由（希望你不要介意 :

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

Live incident 2026-07-17 (jeong-sik/masc#24886): an unbounded caller fan-out drove 17,747 completion attempts against ollama.com in 44 minutes; the provider rejected all but 630 with HTTP 429 `{"error":"too many concurrent requests"}`. OAS had no way to bound concurrent dispatches per endpoi

title: [PR] feat(codegen): validate declared IS-A (Table-Per-Type) relationships
summary:
## What this PR does

CodeGen now **validates** IS-A (Table-Per-Type) relationships that a schema author
**explicitly declared** — and stops the build if the declaration can't actually work.
It does **not** auto-detect IS-A from schema shape.

title: [PR] fix(ci): fork-minimal CI — only tests/lint/typecheck/skills-index
summary:
## Problem

Upstream CI fails on forks because fork repositories don't inherit PyPI, Docker, and Vercel secrets. This causes CI to fail on jobs like `docker`, `supply-chain-audit`, `deploy-site`.

## Solution

Minimal fork CI that ONLY runs sub-workflows that work without custom secrets:
- `tests.ym

title: [PR] fix(quota): Ollama Cloud credential validation and UI decoupling (#2187)
summary:
Closes #2187

### Problem

Ollama Cloud usage tracking fails with "Provider not configured" even after setup. Three root-cause issues:

1. **Credential validation always fails (web runtime)** — `fetchOllamaCloudUsage` uses `redirect: 'manual'` and treats all 3xx responses as auth failure. ollama.com
